questions.text:
Smart Contract (TodoList.sol) - 10 marks
Submit the complete Solidity contract with the Task struct, createTask, toggleCompleted, getTaskCount, and getAllTasks functions. Must include events and proper input validation. The contract must compile successfully with Solidity 0.8.20.
questions.explanation: 4 marks: Correct Task struct and state variable (array).3 marks: createTask with validation and event emission.2 marks: toggleCompleted with existence check and event emission.1 mark: getTaskCount and getAllTasks view functions.
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Grading Rubric

4 marks: Correct Task struct and state variable (array).
3 marks: createTask with validation and event emission.
2 marks: toggleCompleted with existence check and event emission.
1 mark: getTaskCount and getAllTasks view functions.

questions.text:
Test Suite (TodoList.test.js) - 8 marks
Submit a Hardhat test file with at least 12 tests covering deployment, task creation (including edge cases like empty content), task toggling (including non-existent task ID), and event emission verification.
questions.explanation: 2 marks: Deployment tests (initial state).3 marks: createTask tests (happy path + empty string + long string + event).2 marks: toggleCompleted tests (toggle + double toggle + non-existent ID + event).1 mark: getAllTasks test verifying correct ordering.
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Grading Rubric

2 marks: Deployment tests (initial state).
3 marks: createTask tests (happy path + empty string + long string + event).
2 marks: toggleCompleted tests (toggle + double toggle + non-existent ID + event).
1 mark: getAllTasks test verifying correct ordering.

questions.text:
Deployment to MST Testnet - 6 marks
Submit the deployment script, the deployed contract address on MST Testnet (Chain ID 4545), and a link to the verified contract on MSTScan. The contract must be verified so source code is visible on the explorer.
questions.explanation: 2 marks: Correct deployment script.2 marks: Successful deployment to MST Testnet (contract address provided).2 marks: Contract verified on MSTScan (source code visible).
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Grading Rubric

2 marks: Correct deployment script.
2 marks: Successful deployment to MST Testnet (contract address provided).
2 marks: Contract verified on MSTScan (source code visible).

questions.text:
React Frontend - 6 marks
Submit the complete React frontend built with Vite that includes: wallet connection (BridgeKey or MetaMask), display of all tasks with completion status, a form to add new tasks, and the ability to toggle task completion. The frontend must be connected to your deployed MST Testnet contract.
questions.explanation: 2 marks: Wallet connection and account display.2 marks: Task display with correct completion status and styling.2 marks: Add task form and toggle functionality with transaction handling.
questions.modelAnswer:
📊 Grading Rubric

2 marks: Wallet connection and account display.
2 marks: Task display with correct completion status and styling.
2 marks: Add task form and toggle functionality with transaction handling.
